title: Cinq filles en furie
writer: Louis Soulanes, Robert Topart, Maurice Cury
actors: Marc Bonseignour, Madeleine Constant, Nicole Mérouze
plot: Two branches of the same family fight for the love of a handsome Spanish poacher, and to retrieve the location of a treasure hidden by an ancestor during WWII, which secret is guarded by Marthe, their spinster aunt.
